info.title: Clinic Appointments API
info.description: Clinic Appointments API documentation using OpenAPI 3.1

get.summary: Get a service available by id
Get all services grouped by specification

Cpf.description: CPF digits with or without punctuations

Cnpj.description: CNPJ digits with or without punctuations

Date.description: date only string in format YYYY-MM-DD

Time.description: time only string in format HH:MM:SS

ProblemDetails.description: Represents a standardized error response following RFC 7807. Provides both machine-readable and human-readable information about an error condition.

code.description: A machine-readable, domain-specific error code used by clients to implement conditional logic.

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type. This value resolve to documentation describing the error category and possible resolutions.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. It remain stable across occurrences of the same error.

status.description: The HTTP status code returned for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem, providing additional context when necessary.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem, such as a request path or a correlation resource.

traceId.description: A unique identifier used for tracing the request across distributed systems, useful for diagnostics and support.

source.description: Indicates the location of the input associated with the error, such as request body, path parameters, or query parameters.

errors.description: A map of validation errors where each key is a field or parameter name and the value is a list of associated validation messages.

items.description: A validation error message for the associated field.

ValidationProblemDetails.description: Represents an error caused by invalid input or an invalid resource state. Uses code 'validation_error' and HTTP status 400. Includes detailed validation messages in the 'errors' property and may indicate the input location through 'source'.

AuthProblemDetails.description: Represents an authentication failure. Uses code 'auth_error' and HTTP status 401. Occurs when credentials are missing, invalid, or expired, such as incorrect login information or an invalid authentication token.

InvalidAccessProblemDetails.description: Represents an authorization failure. Uses code 'forbidden_error' and HTTP status 403. Occurs when the authenticated user does not have permission to access the requested resource or perform the operation.

NotFoundProblemDetails.description: Represents a missing resource. Uses code 'resource_not_found' and HTTP status 404. Occurs when the specified resource cannot be found.

ConflictProblemDetails.description: Represents a resource conflict. Uses code 'resource_conflict' and HTTP status 409. Occurs when attempting to create or modify a resource that would violate a uniqueness constraint.

InternalProblemDetails.description: Represents an unexpected server error. Uses code 'internal_error' and HTTP status 500. Indicates that the server encountered an unhandled condition while processing the request.
